Based on the README.md in the webapp project, here are all the API endpoints mentioned:

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| `GET` | `/api/users` | List all users |
| `POST` | `/api/users` | Create a new user |
| `GET` | `/api/health` | Health check |

The README also mentions the app uses a simple controller pattern where each route maps to a handler function.
